pr.title: Record: 0.2873 BPB — Fine-Grained N-gram Cache (65K chunks)

output.summary: Eval-time N-gram cache refreshes every 65K tokens so multi-order stats update frequently, letting a score-first cache boost predictions without retraining.
techniques: Smaller score-first chunks trigger more frequent cache rewrites
Entropy-adaptive order 2-9 backoff with per-order multipliers
GPTQ-int5, LeakyReLU(0.9)², and multi-query attention architecture
